name: Double-Fudge Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. Grease a 13 x 9 inch pan.
3. In a large bowl with a mixer, cream the butter until smooth.
4. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Add the Double-Fudge Brownie Mix and continue to beat the mixture until it is smooth.
6. Spread the mixture into the greased pan.
7. Bake for 40 to 50 minutes.
